title: Pedigree recalls high protein wet dog food over contamination concerns - KITV
date: '2026-07-07'

source: Google News

summary: >-
  Hawaii DOH Food and Drug Branch announced that Mars Petcare US, Inc. is
  recalling two lots of Pedigree Can High Protein Chopped Chicken & Duck Flavor
  wet dog food because it may contain metal and plastic pieces. Mars Petcare had
  identified the lots for destruction before distribution, but a third-party
  vendor diverted and sold them in the U.S. Officials do not know whether the
  product reached Hawaii. There have been no reports of pet illness or injury.
  Dog owners should check their labels and stop using the recalled food
  immediately; replacement can be initiated through a link provided by the FDB.

---
Hawaii DOH Food and Drug Branch announced that Mars Petcare US, Inc. is recalling two lots of Pedigree Can High Protein Chopped Chicken & Duck Flavor wet dog food because it may contain metal and plastic pieces. Mars Petcare had identified the lots for destruction before distribution, but a third-party vendor diverted and sold them in the U.S. Officials do not know whether the product reached Hawaii. There have been no reports of pet illness or injury. Dog owners should check their labels and stop using the recalled food immediately; replacement can be initiated through a link provided by the FDB.

[Read the full report on Google News →](https://news.google.?oc=5)
